summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing for Smart Schedule Planner app. Fixed critical MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in all POST endpoints. All 34 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI testing verified landing page, auth redirect, dashboard with role-specific widgets, onboarding, tasks, calendar, settings, and dark mode toggle.

fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not serializable - insert_one() adds _id to doc dict which was returned directly
fixed.fix: Added doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one() in all POST handlers

critical_code_review_comments: MongoDB _id serialization issue was present in all POST endpoints - now fixed
All responses correctly exclude _id field after fix
User isolation working correctly - tasks from User A not visible to User B
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test users via mongosh: test_session_A_001 (student), test_session_B_001 (freelancer), test_session_C_001 (no profile)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test users seeded in MongoDB with session tokens: test_session_A_001 (student profile), test_session_B_001 (freelancer profile), test_session_C_001 (no profile - for testing 400 on task creation). All backend CRUD operations tested and working. Frontend uses Emergent Google Auth - cannot automate OAuth flow, use session cookie injection for testing authenticated pages.

backend: GET /api/auth/me with Authorization Bearer returns user
PATCH /api/user/profile updates user profile_type and theme
Task creation before profile_type set returns 400
Dashboard stats: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns correct structure
User isolation: tasks created by user A not visible to user B
frontend: Landing page renders with Plannr branding and Get started CTA
Clicking Get started redirects to auth.emergentagent.com
Dashboard loads with role-specific widgets (Student: exam/subjects, Freelancer: hours/clients/payments)
Dark mode toggle works from user menu dropdown
Tasks page allows creating task via dialog
Settings page allows switching profile type
